description: Building blocks for clinical tools. Each component is a self-contained block that doctors mix and match — combine them into dashboards, embed them in notes, or use them standalone.
context: Read this first. For full props/types, open the component file (JSDoc header). For composition patterns, see COMPOSITION.md.

medical-disclaimer.description: Medical disclaimer footer — included by all clinical components

layout-disclaimer.description: Prominent medical disclaimer banner for app layout — collapsible, covers regulatory/AI/privacy

error-boundary.description: Error boundary with recovery UI — wrap top-level pages to prevent white screens

vital-signs.description: Editable vital signs panel: BP, HR, RR, Temp, SpO2/FiO2
vital-signs.dataFlow: bidirectional — receives data, reports changes via onData

editSection.trigger: click on a vital sign value when editable=true
editSection.content: save/delete buttons for the edited value

vitalSignsAlert.trigger: automatic when value is out of normal range
vitalSignsAlert.content: red warning badge with alert text

popups.note: All popups use absolute positioning. Any parent Card wrapping this component MUST use overflow-visible to prevent clipping.

acid-base.description: ABG analyzer — disorder detection, compensation, anion gap

props.onData: (result: Result | null) => void — required, fires on every input change and on mount with null

acid-base.dataFlow: output only — reports Result via onData

resultBadges.trigger: automatic when valid analysis results are available
resultBadges.content: badges showing disorders, compensation, expected values, anion gap

popups.note: Result badges render inline below inputs — no absolute positioning, no overflow-visible needed on parent Cards.

bmi.description: BMI calculator with imperial/metric toggle and category badges

telemonitoring.description: Real-time pulse oximetry with animated heartbeat, BPM/SpO2

water-balance.description: Fluid intake/output tracker with insensible loss and net balance

props.data: { weight?, intakeOral?, intakeIv?, diuresis?, defecations? } — all number | string

water-balance.dataFlow: input only — no callbacks, display + edit

timeline.description: Scrollable clinical timeline with duration badges and popovers

props.items: TimelineItem[] — { label, timestamp (unix s), title, description, popoverContent }

timelinePopover.direction: right of each timeline date button
timelinePopover.trigger: click on a timeline date entry

popups.note: Uses shadcn Popover (portal-based, z-50). No overflow-visible needed on parent.

pafi.description: PaO2/FiO2 ratio calculator with ARDS classification

resultBadges.trigger: automatic when valid PaO2 and FiO2 values are entered
resultBadges.content: PaFi ratio badge + ARDS classification badge

popups.note: Result badges render inline below inputs — no absolute positioning, no overflow-visible needed on parent Cards.

dka.description: DKA monitoring with hourly tracking, blood gas analysis (disorders, compensation, anion gap, delta ratio via acid-base analyzer)

props.data: DKAPatientData — initial patient data with readings

dka.dataFlow: bidirectional — receives data, reports changes via onData

resultBadges.content: rate badges, resolution criteria badges, potassium classification

popups.note: All results render inline — no absolute positioning, no overflow-visible needed on parent Cards.

clinical-notes.description: Focused encounter note editor with clinical highlighting and local storage
clinical-notes.dataFlow: none — orchestrates WaterBalance, AcidBase, BMI as inline tools

alertDialog.trigger: click FilePlus button to create new evolution

toolSelect.content: dropdown with Balance hídrico, EAB, BMI options

popups.note: All popups use shadcn portal-based components (z-50). No overflow-visible needed.

sepsis.description: Sepsis-3/SOFA monitoring with qSOFA screening, organ scoring, hour-1 bundle tracker, lactate clearance

props.data: SepsisPatientData — initial patient data with readings

sepsis.dataFlow: bidirectional — receives data, reports changes via onData

resultBadges.content: qSOFA, SOFA total/breakdown, sepsis/shock status, lactate clearance, bundle compliance badges

popups.note: All results render inline — no absolute positioning, no overflow-visible needed on parent Cards.

cardiology.description: Cardiology risk calculators: ASCVD (Pooled Cohort Equations), HEART Score (chest pain triage), CHA₂DS₂-VASc (AF stroke risk)

resultBadges.trigger: automatic when valid inputs are saved
resultBadges.content: risk percentage/score badge + category classification badge

popups.note: Result badges render inline below inputs — no absolute positioning, no overflow-visible needed on parent Cards.
